protein_name: Transcriptional modulator activated by BMP (bone morphogenetic proteins) type 1 receptor kinase. SMAD5 is a receptor-regulated SMAD (R-SMAD). Belongs to the dwarfin/SMAD family. Ubiquitous. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
